raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX - Contacted the Best Buy to report two fraudulent charges on my account XX/XX/XXXX - Followed up with Best buy regarding the fraudulent charges that they had not made reference to the fraudulent activity on my account, to include whoever fraudulently used my card changed the physical address from VA to FL. Best Buy Closed my account XXXX I am unable to access my secure email account features to send a dispute letter to the creditor XX/XX/XXXX - I am still being charged fees or interest during an active dispute. 
Confirmed Fraudulent Charges After XX/XX/XXXX Purchases : {$660.00} Fees : {$58.00} Interest : {$19.00} Total Fraudulent Charges : {$730.00} Overpayment Detected From the promotional balance detail : Original Transaction : {$340.00} Payments & Credits Applied : {$190.00} Remaining Promotional Balance : {$140.00} Current Balance : {$170.00} You have overpaid by {$29.00}, calculated as : {$190.00} ( payments ) - ( {$340.00} - {$140.00} ) = {$29.00} excess payment This amount should be refunded to you immediately. 

Ongoing Interest & Fees Despite disputing the charges : You're still being assessed interest charges and late fees, which should be paused while the dispute is pending or refunded if already paid. 
The deferred interest shown ( {$8.00} ) for a fraudulent purchase should also be canceled entirely. 

Recommended Action Would you like me to draft a formal dispute letter that you can send to : Best Buy Credit Services XXXX Citibank ( for account resolution ) Request : full charge-off of fraudulent balance, refund of overpayment, and cessation of all fees/interest
